title: I Updated /grill-me And Solved Claude Code
summary: Chase AI released grill-me-codex, a skill that verifies Claude Code outputs by building on the grill-me foundation. The tool helps users validate that Claude's code generation makes sense beyond initial planning, addressing a gap in code verification workflows.
